stations.name: Closest stations are Cannon Hill and Manly West (drive)
stations.walk_minutes_note: No station within Belmont. Most addresses drive to the train.

buses.note: Bus routes serve Belmont via Old Cleveland Road and Belmont Road.

driving.motorway_access: Gateway Motorway access via Carindale or Manly. M3 corridor for southern travel.
driving.approx_cbd_minutes_offpeak_note: Approximately 18 to 22 minutes to Brisbane CBD off-peak.

connections: Tingalpa Creek parkland and walking tracks

lifestyle.shops_dining_note: Belmont itself has limited retail. Westfield Carindale is a short drive for big-format retail and dining. The Cannon Hill K-Mart Plaza handles daily-life groceries.

pockets.name: Belmont Hill
pockets.character: Elevated streets with grand homes on larger blocks. Premium pocket.

pockets.name: Old Cleveland Road corridor
pockets.character: Closer to the arterial, more accessible entry point.

buyer_profile.note: Buyers wanting larger blocks and the leafy outer-east family suburb feel.
Iona College and Citipointe access drive a portion of the buyer pool.
Belmont's larger block sizes attract buyers who want space without leaving the inner east corridor.
